name: TenantConfigurationManager

ironRules.rule: MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS MUST be a compile-time constant Set — never read from FREEDOM config or database at runtime. An operator cannot accidentally remove keys from the locked set.
Locked key check MUST run at ORDER 1 before any storage operation. If key is in MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS, return DataProcessResult.failure + emit ConfigKeyImmutable — no storeDocument call.
OCC (optimistic concurrency control) MUST be enabled on all config writes — storeDocument(configRecord, { occ: true }). Concurrent config updates without OCC produce last-write-wins corruption.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — NEVER from request payload. Config writes must be scoped to the authenticated tenant.
TenantConfigurationUpdated MUST be emitted after successful write. ConfigKeyImmutable MUST be emitted on locked key rejection — never silently ignored.

keywords: tenant configuration manager MACHINE_LOCKED_KEYS compile-time OCC write-only ConfigKeyImmutable TenantConfigurationUpdated locked key rejection ALS tenant isolation
